title: Fetch staged candidate source from queue URL
problem: ticket-141 persists ranked discovered candidates to staging candidate_sources and research_queue with landing_page_url or open_access_url. Operators cannot fetch HTML/PDF bytes for a queued candidate into a staging artifact path before ingest.
acceptance_criteria: CLI fetch-candidate or fetch-source loads a staged candidate_sources row by id and fetches URL bytes to a gitignored staging path with network opt-in.
Structured JSON reports fetch status, checksum, content-type; no automatic ingest or claims extraction.
Mocked unit tests only in default pytest collection.
No writes to accepted sources or claims tables.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove fetch CLI path; retain ticket-141 staging enqueue.
